cards.front: What is the main function of the transport layer?
cards.back: To provide reliable data transfer between devices on different networks

cards.front: Which protocol is used for reliable data transfer over the internet?
What is the purpose of the port number in the transport layer?
cards.back: To identify a specific process or application running on a device
